description: Permit Intake — validates building/trade permit applications, checks contractor licensing and insurance, enforces zoning and environmental prerequisites

hard_stops.label: Missing Required Fields
hard_stops.logic: Application is missing one or more required fields as defined by the application_type schema — cannot process incomplete submission

hard_stops.label: Contractor License Expired
hard_stops.logic: Contractor's state license has expired — unlicensed work is prohibited per state contractor licensing statute

hard_stops.label: Contractor Insurance Expired
hard_stops.logic: Contractor's general liability or workers' compensation insurance has lapsed — cannot issue permit without active coverage

hard_stops.label: CO Requested Without Final Inspection
hard_stops.logic: Certificate of Occupancy requested but no final inspection on record — CO cannot be issued per IBC 111.1

hard_stops.label: Zoning Conflict
hard_stops.logic: Proposed use or structure conflicts with current zoning designation — requires variance, conditional use permit, or rezoning before permit issuance

hard_stops.label: Environmental Review Required But Not Filed
hard_stops.logic: Project triggers NEPA/CEQA environmental review threshold but no review has been filed — cannot proceed without clearance

hard_stops.label: Fee Not Paid
hard_stops.logic: Permit application fee payment not confirmed — application cannot be accepted without payment

soft_flags.label: High Valuation Project
soft_flags.logic: Project valuation exceeds $500,000 — may trigger additional plan review requirements or impact fees

soft_flags.label: Historic District Parcel
soft_flags.logic: Parcel is located within a designated historic district — additional design review may be required
